items.name_en: Details, just snap away! Imported aged material from original channels.
items.name_cn:
Details, just snap away! Imported aged material from original channels.
 The popularity of shoulder bags has been unstoppable these past two years! People's attitude towards shoulder bags has shifted from initial resistance to confusion, and finally to pure love! For a bag style to truly become popular, it must not only be stylish but also rare in that it suits everyone; most girls can instantly elevate their stylishness and temperament when carrying it.
size:23*14*7
Search for style: 193952

items.name_en: DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Black Canvas Large'
items.name_cn:
DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Black Canvas Large'
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's item. Featuring a vintage print on canvas with a small metal logo, it is soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is small in weight with great style ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude ~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week everywhere. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 30×42×15CM
Small: 23.5×11×32CM
#088#510

items.name_cn:
Diana 3-Compartment Matte Black 😊
Ultra-matte 🖤SO BLACK
A dark-themed Diana bag
The hardware and chain handle are all textured matte black
If you get tired of all-black, you can add a silk scarf to make it more romantic〰️
Just a heads up, we also include a ribbon🎀
Enough to make you look beautiful and change your mood😊

items.name_cn:
DIANE Handbag #️⃣M45985
Exclusive global launch! This model is custom-made according to boutique specifications with dynamic chip serial numbers. Original factory exclusive fabric and original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure a 100% authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship, latest official website gift box.
24 x 15 x 9 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Aged cowhide trim
Fabric lining
Metal hardware
Magnetic snap closure
Zippered interior pocket
External patch pocket
Strap: Removable, non-adjustable
Bag drop length: 53.0 cm
Handle: Single handle, removable
Made in France

items.name_en: Different colors spark unique brilliance, and different materials create depth and design. BOTTEGA VENETA Large HOP appears in the Retro Denim series. The structured denim pairs with soft leather. Fashion has no standard; innovation is progress. HOP and retro denim, a blend of classic and personal style, casual and lazy yet unique. The extra-large capacity is great for summer, freeing your hands in hot weather.

items.name_cn:
Dimensions 19-9-9CM
Hot Item Alert, the highly anticipated new Papillon Trunk Handbag from overseas channels has arrived. This bag is embellished with metal rivets and S-lock hooks, featuring a traditional new style! The semi-rigid baguette structure is convenient for hand-holding, crossbody, or shoulder carrying.

specs.rawTitle:
Dimensions 19-9-9CM

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 22.5 x 21 x 7cm
2024 Spring/Summer Runway Collection Shipment! Hong Kong Channel Order, Hong Kong Direct Mail Available! Around Me Round Cake Handbag, M47117 Monogram. This handbag reinterprets the brand's classic LV Circle logo with its unique Monogram coated canvas, appearing in a brand-new look. This round handbag features a one-piece handle that creates a simple and elegant appearance, and its compact structure exudes a trendy vibe. The capacity is sufficient to meet your daily needs, perfectly matching your various styles whether carried on the shoulder or in hand.

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 23 x 14 x 12 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Small Black Dior Toujours Shopping Bag. Fashion-forward individuals have already been spotted carrying this; it is cooler than imagined, giving off a chic yet lazy vibe. The familiar oversized woven pattern and the CD buckle used in recent years transform the square bag into a tote bag when unclasped—truly amazing 👍👍👍.
It looks very spacious at first glance, suitable for gym or daily commuting. It comes with an internal small leather pouch that can be removed and used separately! The key detail is the adjustable wrist strap length, allowing for underarm or hand-carry; this detail is truly captivating. A bag that will make you stand out in any crowd, unrestricted by style. A heavyweight bestseller this season—why wait?

items.name_cn:
Dimensions: 24 x 10 x 24.5 cm
Hong Kong Channel Order! Dior CEST Full Leather Bucket Bag. The design is really special, a mix of cool and sweet! At first glance, you will be captivated by its print: the overlapping CD letter print is very eye-catching. Made of calfskin, it has a soft, delicate touch and a moist luster, maintaining an elegant and atmospheric texture!
The "dior" lettering on the pocket is finely engraved, looking very high-end and classy. Looking at the size, it is large enough with internal layering to ensure storage of personal items without looking too bulky. The detail design is simple and orderly, perfect for friends with OCD!
